name: Holiday appointment request
description: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on Thanksgiving Day.
goal: Book an appointment for Thanksgiving Day at 2 PM; if unavailable, accept the next available weekday afternoon.
behavior: Sound sincere and hopeful about the holiday request
Express understanding if the holiday is unavailable
Promptly agree to a weekday alternative if offered
success_criteria: Agent must inform the patient about closure on Thanksgiving Day
Agent should suggest a weekday appointment as an alternative
Agent must confirm the patient's acceptance of a new appointment date
orchestrator_hint: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on a major holiday.
